data.title: WAF (Web Application Firewall)
data.description: Provides protection against web threats by filtering and monitoring HTTP traffic.
data.technical_spec: Advanced WAF rules and bot management.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Mitigates distributed denial-of-service attacks to ensure uptime.
data.technical_spec: Automatic scaling and global data centers.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts regular security assessments to identify vulnerabilities.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Sensitive data is encrypted in transit and at rest.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption for data at rest.

data.title: User Behavior Analytics
data.description: Monitors user activity to detect anomalies and potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning algorithms for behavior analysis.
